{{Quote|Lancet standing by.|Anonymous Lancet pilot|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
The '''Lancet Aerial Artillery''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] air vehicle derived from both the [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] and the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] family.

==Characteristics==
{{Quote|Blast them out!|Anonymous Lancet pilot|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption" />}}
[[File:LAA_bombing.jpg|thumb|left|A Lancet in action.]]

Blending the dual cylindrical pods of the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] with the flat-bodied tri-wing configuration of the ''Lambda''-class [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], Lancets were armed with a powerful [[proton beam cannon]] centrally mounted on the fore of the fuselage and angled optimally for air-to-ground attacks. However, the solar array used for TIE's was incorporated into the tri-wing form. They also had 2 anti-air systems to defend themselves.

Like their spacefaring relatives, their lack of combat [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] made them vulnerable to anti-aircraft [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser]] and [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass-driver cannons]].

The Lancet was capable of causing tremendous damage to land-based targets. However, its weapons were found to be less effective against mobile targets.

==Behind the scenes==
The game data file MODELS.MEG refers to the Lancet as the "TIE Lancet," but this is not the craft's in-game label.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
